description:
Audit top 20 most-rendered components with React DevTools. Apply React.memo to list items, table rows, and sidebar widgets. Colocate local state to prevent global re-renders. Use useMemo/useCallback on hot paths only.

**Rationale:** Unnecessary re-renders are the #1 React perf issue. Memoization blocks updates when props are stable while colocation limits re-render scope.
title: Targeted component memoization and state colocation
